title: Wire Reset Maintenance Fund Admin Button to Backend

requirements.summary: Wire the existing 'Reset Fund' admin button in the MaintenanceManagement frontend component to call the new resetMaintenanceFund backend function via a React Query mutation hook, displaying success or error toast on completion
acceptanceCriteria: A `useResetMaintenanceFund` mutation hook is added to frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts
The mutation calls the backend `resetMaintenanceFund` function via the actor
On success, relevant queries (maintenance fund data) are invalidated and a success toast is shown
On error, an error toast is shown
The Reset Fund button in MaintenanceManagement is disabled for non-admin users and shows a loading state while the mutation is in flight

file_operations.description: Add a `useResetMaintenanceFund` mutation hook that calls the backend `resetMaintenanceFund` function. On success, invalidate the `maintenanceFundStatus` and `financialMetricsDetailed` queries to refresh the maintenance fund data. The hook should handle errors gracefully and return the mutation state.

Import and use the `useResetMaintenanceFund` mutation hook. Connect the existing 'Reset Fund' button to trigger the mutation. Display the mutation loading state on the button (disable and show spinner/loading text while in flight). Show a success toast on successful reset using the existing toast pattern. Show an error toast on failure. Ensure the button is disabled for non-admin users by checking the user role from the appropriate query hook.
